response:
CANDIDATE_PARTIAL: HeavyCruiser(ussSalem)
CANDIDATE_OVERWEAK: Exists x (HeavyCruiser(x) & BuiltFor(x, unitedStatesNavy))
CANDIDATE_OVERSTRONG: HeavyCruiser(ussSalem) & BuiltFor(ussSalem, unitedStatesNavy) & Exists x (BuiltFor(x, unitedStatesNavy))
CANDIDATE_GIBBERISH: BuiltFor(unitedStatesNavy, ussSalem)
